viewDef:
SELECT p.id,
    p.full_name AS name,
    u.email,
    u.encrypted_password AS "passwordHash",
        CASE
            WHEN p.role::text = 'fleet_manager'::text THEN 'FLEET_MANAGER'::text
            WHEN p.role::text = 'dispatcher'::text THEN 'DISPATCHER'::text
            WHEN p.role::text = 'safety_officer'::text THEN 'SAFETY_OFFICER'::text
            WHEN p.role::text = 'financial_analyst'::text THEN 'FINANCIAL_ANALYST'::text
            WHEN p.role::text = 'driver'::text THEN 'DRIVER'::text
            ELSE upper(p.role::text)
        END AS role,
    true AS "isActive",
    p.locked_until AS "lockedUntil",
    p.failed_login_attempts AS "failedLoginAttempts",
    p.created_at AS "createdAt",
    p.created_at AS "updatedAt"
   FROM profiles p
     JOIN auth.users u ON p.id = u.id;
